content.cn_text: 你将听到两个刚刚结束暑假回到大学的学生。听路易斯和凯瑞谈论他们的假期。
content.en_text: You will hear two students who have just returned to university after their summer vacation. Listen to Louise and Kerry talking about their vacation.

content.cn_text: 首先，看问题1至问题4。
content.en_text: First, look at Questions 1 to 4.

content.cn_text: (短暂的停顿)
content.en_text: [SHORT PAUSE]

content.cn_text: 您将看到已经为您完成了一个示例。对于这个问题，只播放与示例相关的对话。
content.en_text: You will see that there is an example already done for you. For this question only the conversation relating to the example will be played first.

content.cn_text: 凯瑞:嗨，露易丝，你的暑假过得怎么样?
content.en_text: Kerry: Hi Louise - how was your summer vacation?

content.cn_text: 路易丝:哦，太棒了!我昨天才从欧洲回来。
content.en_text: Louise: Oh fantastic! I only got back from Europe yesterday.

content.cn_text: 克里:哇!听起来很令人兴奋。
content.en_text: Kerry: Wow! That sounds exciting.

content.cn_text: 路易丝:是的。你假期过得怎么样?
content.en_text: Louise: Yes, it was. How was your holiday?

content.cn_text: 凯瑞:和你的比起来挺安静的。我只是待在剑桥附近……
content.en_text: Kerry: Pretty quiet compared with yours. I just stayed around Cambridge...

content.cn_text: 路易丝说她昨天刚从欧洲回来，所以正确的答案是欧洲。
content.en_text: Louise said that she had just got back from Europe yesterday, so the correct answer is EUROPE.

content.cn_text: 现在我们开始吧。你应该边听边回答问题，因为你不会听到第二次录音。
content.en_text: Now we shall begin. You should answer the questions as you listen because you will not hear the recording a second time.

content.cn_text: 现在仔细听录音，回答问题1至问题4。
content.en_text: Now listen carefully and answer Questions 1 to 4.

content.cn_text: 凯瑞:嗨，露易丝，你的暑假过得怎么样?
content.en_text: Kerry: Hi Louise - how was your summer vacation?

content.cn_text: 路易丝:哦，太棒了!我昨天才从欧洲回来。
content.en_text: Louise: Oh fantastic! I only got back from Europe yesterday.

content.cn_text: 克里:哇!听起来很令人兴奋。
content.en_text: Kerry: Wow! That sounds exciting.

content.cn_text: 路易丝:是的。你假期过得怎么样?
content.en_text: Louise: Yes, it was. How was your holiday?

content.cn_text: 凯瑞:和你的比起来挺安静的。我只是待在剑桥附近，但是我们计划下学期末去欧洲。
content.en_text: Kerry: Pretty quiet compared with yours. I just stayed around Cambridge - but we're planning to go to Europe at the end of next term.

content.cn_text: 露易丝:哦，你会玩得很开心的!我非常推荐它。你打算怎么四处走走?
content.en_text: Louise: Oh you'll have a great time! I really recommend it. How are you going to get around?

content.cn_text: 凯瑞:嗯，我们想过租一辆车。坐飞机太贵了。你做了什么?
content.en_text: Kerry: Well, we've thought about renting a car. Flying is far too expensive. What did you do?

content.cn_text: 露易丝:我们买了欧洲火车票，坐火车环游了欧洲。
content.en_text: Louise: We bought Eurail tickets and traveled around Example Europe by train.

content.cn_text: 凯丽:贵吗?
content.en_text: Kerry: Was it expensive?

content.cn_text: 路易丝:不，不太喜欢。一张欧洲青年通票花了我们203英镑。
content.en_text: Louise: No, not really. It cost us £203 for a Eurailpass Youth Ticket.

content.cn_text: 凯瑞:我听说过欧洲铁路，它包括什么?
content.en_text: Kerry: I've heard of Eurail - what did that include?

content.cn_text: 路易丝:你可以无限制地乘坐火车往返于17个欧洲国家。它持续了一个月。
content.en_text: Louise: Well, you get unlimited train travel in and between seventeen European countries. It lasted for a month.

content.cn_text: 凯瑞:嗯，203英镑，听起来很合理。这十七个地方你都参观了吗?
content.en_text: Kerry: Gee for £203 that sounds reasonable. Did you visit all of the seventeen places?

content.cn_text: 路易斯:是的，除了爱尔兰。我们真的不明白为什么爱尔兰被包括在通行证上，而英格兰却没有。
content.en_text: Louise: Yes, all except for Ireland. We couldn't really understand why Ireland was included on the pass but England wasn't.

content.cn_text: 凯瑞:是的，这似乎有点奇怪。包括从伦敦到巴黎的英吉利海峡隧道吗?
content.en_text: Kerry: Yes, that seems a bit strange. Did it include the trip from London to Paris in the Channel Tunnel?

content.cn_text: 路易丝:没有，不幸的是，我们要额外付费，但是我们得到了折扣，因为我们是学生。
content.en_text: Louise: No, unfortunately we had to pay extra for that train but we did get a discounted fare because we're students.

content.cn_text: 凯瑞:对门票还有其他限制吗?
content.en_text: Kerry: Were there any other restrictions on the tickets?

content.cn_text: 路易丝:嗯，如果你想付更多或更少的钱，你可以选择另一种计划——有15天和21天的计划，也有2个月和3个月的计划。青少年票的唯一限制是你必须在26岁以下。
content.en_text: Louise: Well, if you want to pay more or less money you can choose another plan - there are 15 and 21 day plans or 2 and 3 month plans. The only restriction for the Youth Ticket is that you have to be under 26.

content.cn_text: 凯丽:这对我和我的朋友都很合适。我们都还不到26岁。我们一起上学。
content.en_text: Kerry: That suits my friends and me. None of us are 26 yet. We went to school together.

content.cn_text: 路易丝:哦，你真的必须这么做。坐火车既安全又方便，是游览乡村的好方法。天气很好，人也很好!
content.en_text: Louise: Oh, you really have to do it. It's safe and easy and a great way to see the countryside. The weather was fantastic and so were the people!

content.cn_text: 凯丽:听起来不错。
content.en_text: Kerry: It sounds great.

content.cn_text: 路易丝和凯瑞继续谈论在欧洲乘火车旅行。当你听剩下的
content.en_text: Louise and Kerry go on to talk about travelling by train in Europe. As you listen to the rest of the

content.cn_text: 对话，回答问题5至10。
content.en_text: conversation, answer Questions 5 to 10.

content.cn_text: 在对话继续之前，阅读问题5至问题10。
content.en_text: Before the conversation continues, read Questions 5 to 10.

content.cn_text: (短暂的停顿)
content.en_text: [SHORT PAUSE]

content.cn_text: 凯瑞:你旅行中最好的部分是什么?
content.en_text: Kerry: What was the best part of your trip?

content.cn_text: 路易丝:火车确实给了我们自由来计划我们自己的假期。我们去了很多偏僻的地方，认识了很多当地人——你知道，火车仍然是一种重要的交通方式的乡村小镇。
content.en_text: Louise: The trains really gave us the freedom to plan our own holiday. We went to lots of places which were out-of-the-way and met lots of local people - you know, small rural towns where trains are still an important form of transport.

content.cn_text: 凯瑞:我们想见见当地的人——你很容易做到吗?
content.en_text: Kerry: We'd like to meet the local people - did you do that easily?

content.cn_text: 路易丝:对，欧洲的火车不像伦敦的通勤火车。在欧洲，人们喜欢在火车上聊天。
content.en_text: Louise: Yes, the trains in Europe aren't like the commuter trains in London. People like to talk and have a chat on trains in Europe.

content.cn_text: 凯丽:那很好。
content.en_text: Kerry: That's nice.

content.cn_text: 露易丝:是的。火车的时间也很好。有时我们不得不早起赶火车，因为火车要穿越到另一个国家，但大多数时候，我们对时刻表很满意。非常守时的人。
content.en_text: Louise: Yes. The train times were OK as well. Sometimes we had to get up early to catch the trains which were crossing into another country but most of the time, we were satisfied with the timetables. Very punctual.

content.cn_text: 凯瑞:我们要带闹钟吗?
content.en_text: Kerry: Should we take an alarm clock?

content.cn_text: 路易丝:嗯，我会的。有闹钟让我们睡得更舒服。我们知道我们会准时醒来。
content.en_text: Louise: Well, I would. Having an alarm clock made us sleep more comfortably. We knew that we'd wake up on time.

content.cn_text: 凯丽:火车安全吗?你们是在晚上旅行吗?
content.en_text: Kerry: And were the trains safe - did you travel at night?

content.cn_text: 露易丝:很多学生在晚上旅行，因为这样可以省下住宿费。
content.en_text: Louise: Lots of students traveled at night because it saved having to pay for accommodation.

content.cn_text: 凯丽:我还没想过呢。
content.en_text: Kerry: I hadn't thought of that.

content.cn_text: 露易丝:嗯，很多人都想到了。我们更喜欢住在当地的酒吧或学生宿舍，因为你可以和当地人打成一片。夜间列车上挤满了英国学生!
content.en_text: Louise: Well, lots of others have thought of it. We preferred to stay in local pubs or student hostels because you could mix with the locals. The night trains were filled with British students!

content.cn_text: 凯瑞:听起来你的经历很愉快。你有什么建议我们采取或做的吗?
content.en_text: Kerry: It sounds as if you had a very positive experience. Is there anything you'd recommend we take or do?

content.cn_text: 路易丝:让我想想——我当然可以告诉你什么不该带，什么不该做。不要带太多行李。火车上没有太多空间放大行李箱。一个背包或两个小包比一个大包好。这样你也可以很容易地上下车。
content.en_text: Louise: Let me see -I can certainly tell you what not to take or do. Don't take much luggage. There just isn't very much room in the trains for big suitcases. A backpack or two small bags is better than one big bag. That way you can also get on and off the trains easily too.

content.cn_text: 凯丽:我会记住的。我妈妈总是说要在度假前一个星期收拾好行李，然后在出发的前一天晚上拿出一半。
content.en_text: Kerry: I'll remember that. My mother always says to pack one week before you go on vacation and then take half of it out the night before you leave.

content.cn_text: 路易丝:这是个好建议，尤其是当你乘坐拥挤的火车时。另一件事是要小心你的贵重物品。很多学生的钱和护照都被偷了，尤其是在晚上。
content.en_text: Louise: That's good advice - especially when you're riding on cramped trains. The other thing is to be careful with your valuables. Lots of students had money and passports stolen - especially at night.

content.cn_text: 凯瑞:你有东西被偷吗?
content.en_text: Kerry: Did you have anything stolen?

content.cn_text: 露易丝:没有，但我们遇到过很多东西被偷的人。我们的夹克下面都有钱带。
content.en_text: Louise: No but we met lots of people who did have things stolen. We all had money belts under our jackets.

content.cn_text: 凯瑞:我得买一个。
content.en_text: Kerry: I'll have to buy one of those.

content.cn_text: 路易丝:是的，你应该——或者如果你愿意，你可以借我的。
content.en_text: Louise: Yes, you should - or you can borrow mine if you like.

content.cn_text: 凯丽:哦，谢谢，那太好了。
content.en_text: Kerry: Oh thanks - that'd be good.

content.cn_text: 路易丝:我建议你做的另一件事是确保你在每个国家花合理的时间。我们发现很多学生旅行太快，他们没有足够的时间去认识当地人，享受当地的食物和文化。
content.en_text: Louise: The only other thing I'd advise you to do is to make sure you spend a reasonable amount of time in each country. We found that lots of students traveled too quickly and they didn't have enough time to meet the locals and enjoy the food and the culture.

content.cn_text: 凯瑞:你认为你在每个国家需要多长时间?
content.en_text: Kerry: How long do you think you need in each country?

content.cn_text: 路易丝:我不能说，这取决于你遇到的人，你喜欢做什么，当然还有天气。在一些海边的地方，天气非常温暖，阳光明媚，我们在那里呆了四五天。在其他城镇，如果非常安静或无聊，我们就在那里过夜。
content.en_text: Louise: I can't say - it'll depend on who you meet and what you like to do and of course,the weather. It was so warm and sunny in some beach-side places that we stayed for four or five days. In other towns, if it was very quiet or boring, we just stayed overnight.

content.cn_text: 凯瑞:我想这就是火车的好处。你可以随心所欲地来来去去。
content.en_text: Kerry: I guess that's what's great about the train. You can come and go as you please.

content.cn_text: 路易斯:没错，而且更便宜，更放松，更不用说更安全了，我想我不习惯在路的右边开车!
content.en_text: Louise: Exactly - and it's cheaper and much more relaxing - not to mention safer - I don't think I could get used to driving on the right-hand-side of the road!

content.cn_text: 第一节到此结束。现在你有半分钟的时间检查答案。
content.en_text: That is the end of Section 1. You now have 1/2 minute to check your answers.

content.cn_text: 现在翻到听力问题册的第二部分。。
content.en_text: Now t urn to Section 2 of your Listening Question Booklet.

groups.desc:
Questions 1-4
Answer the questions below.
Use NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS OR A NUMBER for each answer.
Example: Where did Louise spend her summer holidays? .....Europe....

items.title: How much was a Eurailpass Youth Ticket?
items.analysis: 这道题的答案是203英镑，因为原文中Louise明确说道："It cost us £203 for a Eurailpass Youth Ticket"。这里有几个关键点需要注意：首先，题目直接询问Eurailpass Youth Ticket的价格，这是我们需要在听力中寻找的关键信息。其次，在听力中，"cost"这个词是一个重要的信号词，它直接引出了价格信息。最后，£203这个具体数字就是我们需要的答案。在听力考试中，当你听到与题目相关的关键词（如Eurailpass、Youth Ticket）以及表示价格的词（如cost）时，要特别留意紧随其后的数字信息。这种精确的数字信息通常就是我们需要的答案。

items.title: How many European countries did Louise's ticket allow her to travel to?
items.analysis: 这道题的关键在于准确捕捉与"European countries"相关的数字信息。文中明确提到Eurail通票包含"seventeen European countries"，这直接回答了题目询问的欧洲国家数量。需要注意的是，虽然文中出现了其他数字（如203英镑的票价），但这些数字与国家数量无关。正确答案"17"直接对应了文中提到的"seventeen"，表明Louise的车票允许她在17个欧洲国家旅行。这个数字是明确且唯一的，没有其他可能的答案。因此，仔细聆听与"European countries"相关的数字信息是回答这个问题的关键。

items.title: Did the Eurailpass Youth Ticket include the train from London to Paris?
items.analysis: 这道题的关键在于理解Eurailpass Youth Ticket的覆盖范围。从原文中我们可以看到，Louise明确表示他们需要为伦敦到巴黎的列车额外付费（"pay extra"）。这意味着Eurailpass Youth Ticket并不包含这段行程。虽然他们因为是学生而获得了折扣，但这并不改变需要额外付费的事实。因此，正确答案是"no"。这个问题考察了你对细节的把握能力，以及区分"包含在内"和"获得折扣"这两个概念的能力。记住，即使有折扣，只要需要额外付费，就意味着原票并不包含这部分行程。

items.title: How old must you be if you want to purchase a Eurailpass Youth Ticket?
items.analysis: 这道题的关键在于准确理解Youth Ticket的年龄限制。文中明确指出"The only restriction for the Youth Ticket is that you have to be under 26"，这里的"under 26"就是我们需要的答案。"under"意味着"小于"或"低于"，所以正确答案应该是"under 26"或"less than 26"。注意，不能只写"26"，因为这样会忽略"under"这个重要的限定词。另外，虽然原文使用了"have to be"，但在回答中我们只需要给出年龄限制本身。记住，在听力考试中，有时候答案并不是原文的完全重复，而是需要你理解意思并用简洁的方式表达出来。

groups.desc:
Questions 5-10
Complete the notes below.
Use NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS for each answer.
groups.collect:
Points that Louise makes about Eurail:
• easy to travel to small towns
• easy to meet $17529$
• $17530$ with times of the trains
• niqht trains had many $17531$ as passenaers
Advice that Louise gives about Eurail:
• Don't take $17532$ bags
• Be $17533$ with your belongings
• Spend enough time in each country to experience $17534$

items.analysis: 这道题的正确答案是"locals"或"local people"，因为题目要求填写Louise容易遇到的人。在原文中，Louise提到欧洲火车上的人喜欢交谈和聊天，这暗示了她很容易遇到当地人。虽然原文没有直接使用"locals"或"local people"这些词，但我们可以从上下文推断出她说的是当地人。记住，在旅行的语境中，"meet people"通常指的是遇到当地人。此外，题目要求不超过三个词，所以"locals"或"local people"都是合适的答案。注意避免被"European people"等词误导，因为题目询问的是Louise遇到的人，而不是特定国家的人。

这道题的关键在于理解Louise对列车时间的整体评价。虽然她提到有时需要早起赶车，但紧接着就说"most of the time, we were satisfied with the timetables"。这里的"satisfied"（满意的）就是我们需要的答案。"satisfied"或"OK"都是合适的答案，因为它们都表达了对时间安排的满意。注意，虽然Louise也提到了"Very punctual"（非常准时），但这不符合题目要求的三个词以内的答案。此外，"early"虽然在原文中出现，但它只是描述了个别情况，不能代表对整体时间安排的评价。因此，正确答案应该是"satisfied"或"OK"，它们既符合原文意思，又符合题目的字数限制。

这道题的关键在于准确定位和理解特定信息。题目询问夜间列车的乘客情况，而原文中明确指出"The night trains were filled with British students!"（夜间列车上挤满了英国学生）。这句话直接回答了题目的问题。需要注意的是，虽然对话中多次提到学生和当地人，但题目特别询问的是夜间列车的情况。因此，正确答案是"British students"（英国学生）。这个答案不仅符合题目要求的不超过三个词，而且准确反映了原文中描述的夜间列车乘客情况。在做这类题目时，要特别注意定位词（如本题中的"night trains"），并在听到相关信息时仔细捕捉紧随其后的描述。

items.answer: many / big / too many / too big
items.analysis: 这道题的关键在于理解Louise给出的建议。她明确说了"Don't take much luggage"（不要带太多行李）和"There just isn't very much room in the trains for big suitcases"（火车上没有太多空间放大箱子）。这两句话直接对应了题目中的"Don't take 【    】 bags"。因此，正确答案应该是描述行李数量多或体积大的词，即"(too) many/big"。Louise建议不要带太多或太大的行李，而是建议带背包或小包，这进一步确认了我们的答案。记住，在听力考试中，我们常常需要将听到的信息稍作转换才能填入答案，比如这里从"much luggage"和"big suitcases"转换为"(too) many/big bags"。

这道题的关键在于理解旅行安全建议的表达方式。原文中Louise提到"be careful with your valuables"，这是一个常见的安全提醒。"careful"是这里的关键词，它直接对应题目中要求填写的空白。"valuables"则是题目中"belongings"的同义词，起到了定位的作用。Louise还进一步解释了为什么要小心，提到很多学生丢失了钱和护照，这强调了"careful"的重要性。所以，正确答案是"careful"，它既符合原文的表述，又符合题目要求的词数限制（不超过三个词）。记住，在听力考试中，当你听到类似"be careful with"这样的表达时，通常它就是答案所在之处。

这道题的答案是"the culture/food"，因为原文中Louise建议花足够的时间在每个国家，以便"enjoy the food and the culture"。题干中的"experience"与原文中的"enjoy"是同义替换，都表示体验或感受的意思。食物（food）和文化（culture）是最能代表一个国家特色的两个方面，也是旅行中最值得体验的内容。Louise强调了花时间体验这些元素的重要性，因此这个答案最符合题目要求。注意，虽然原文还提到了"meet the locals"，但题目特别询问的是"experience"的对象，因此"food and culture"是更准确的答案。记住，在雅思听力中，我们常常需要根据上下文和题目要求来选择最恰当的信息。
